title: .NET Web API with Clean Architecture
objective: Scaffold a .NET 9 Web API following Clean Architecture with layered project structure.

criteria.text: Solution with 5 projects: Api, Application, Domain, Infrastructure, Persistence
ASP.NET Core Web API with controllers

notes: Implemented as PersonalFinance.slnx with full layer separation. API runs on port 7208.

title: React + Vite frontend scaffold
objective: Set up React 18 + TypeScript frontend with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui component library.

criteria.text: Vite dev server running on port 8080
React Query for server state management
API client layer connecting to .NET backend

title: Docker Compose orchestration
objective: Containerize all services with Docker Compose for one-command local development.

criteria.text: docker compose up starts all services
Frontend container (Nginx serving built React app)

title: EF Core + PostgreSQL schema & migrations
objective: Design and implement the database schema with EF Core migrations for transactions and category rules.

criteria.text: Transaction entity with full field set
Seed data for 106 default category rules
Snake_case naming convention via EF Core

title: Bank statement CSV/PDF parsers
objective: Parse bank statement files (CSV and PDF) into structured transaction data.

criteria.text: BCA CSV parser for Indonesian BCA bank statements
NeoBank PDF parser for PDF statements
Upload preview endpoint returns parsed data

title: CQRS + MediatR pipeline
objective: Implement CQRS pattern using MediatR with FluentValidation for all command/query inputs.

title: Category rules feature (CRUD)
objective: Full CRUD for transaction categorization rules — keyword-based matching for automatic category assignment.

title: Cash flow dashboard with charts
objective: Interactive dashboard showing cash flow trends, expense breakdowns, and category analysis.

criteria.text: Transaction table with search and filtering
Drill-down view by category and month

title: Delete scaffold leftovers and dead code
objective: Remove template scaffold files and a third-party CDN script that add confusion and pose a security risk.
notes: WeatherForecast files: .NET template leftovers. UnitTest1.cs: empty test. CDN script: unpinned cdn.gpteng.co — security risk (SEC-03).

title: Fix exception detail leaking to API clients
objective: Stop returning internal exception messages (ex.Message) in HTTP 500 responses. Replace with generic error messages.

criteria.text: UploadPreview catch block returns generic message
GetDashboardData catch block returns generic message
No ex.Message in any HTTP response body

notes: TransactionsController.cs line 98 and 277 leak ex.Message. Replace with generic: "File processing failed." Addresses ERR-01.

title: Fix N+1 query in CategorizeAsync
objective: Fix N+1 query pattern: CategorizeAsync queries DB per transaction row. 500-row file = 500 DB queries.

criteria.text: Batch method loads rules once, categorizes in-memory
Callers in parsers updated to use batch method
Existing CategorizeAsync still works for single-item

notes: CategoryRuleService.CategorizeAsync() calls _dbContext.CategoryRules per invocation. Fix: load all rules once, iterate in-memory. Addresses PERF-01.

title: Move DTOs to correct project
objective: Fix namespace/location mismatch: DTOs live in Infrastructure/Dtos/ but declare namespace Application.Dtos.

criteria.text: Empty Folder include removed from Application.csproj

notes: Also moved IBankStatementParser and ICategoryRuleService interfaces to Application/Interfaces/ (ARCH-02 fix). Reversed Application→Infrastructure dependency to Infrastructure→Application (partial ARCH-01 fix).

title: Extract dashboard aggregation from controller
objective: Move ~100 lines of inline aggregation logic from TransactionsController into a dedicated DashboardService.

criteria.text: GetDashboardDataAsync method contains all aggregation logic
Category rule creation extracted from SubmitTransactions

notes: GetDashboardData: year/month filtering, income/expense aggregation, percentage changes, top categories, 6-month cash flow. Addresses ARCH-04.

title: Update PROJECT_CONTEXT.md to match codebase
objective: Fix documented values that drift from actual codebase: .NET version, testing framework, ID types.
notes: Straightforward text replacements. int PKs are already built and migrated — changing to Guid would require migration rewrite.

title: Add Current Phase section to CLAUDE.md
objective: Add a Current Phase section so future Claude Code sessions can pick up context without re-auditing the repo.

criteria.text: Section includes: status, working features, tech debt, blockers
Habit documented: update at end of each session

notes: Context preservation for multi-session development. Prevents losing state between Claude Code conversations.

title: Hello LLM — first Anthropic API call
objective: Write a Python script that calls the Anthropic API and gets a response. First contact with LLM programming.

criteria.text: Script calls Claude API with system + user prompt
Successfully receives and prints a response
API key via environment variable (never hardcoded)

notes: Day 1 of AI learning journey. Start with claude-sonnet-4-20250514. Experiment with temperature. Log token usage.

title: Structured output — text → JSON via LLM
objective: Send messy bank transaction text to an LLM and get back structured JSON. Learn prompt engineering for reliable output.

criteria.text: Script sends raw transaction text to LLM
LLM returns structured JSON with date, description, amount, currency, type
JSON output is consistent across runs (low temperature)
Handles edge cases: missing fields, ambiguous amounts

notes: Use temperature=0 for deterministic output. Test with real BCA statement lines. Compare Anthropic vs OpenAI.

title: FastAPI AI microservice scaffold
objective: Wrap the LLM parsing logic into a FastAPI service with proper request/response models.

criteria.text: FastAPI app with /health and POST /parse endpoints

notes: ai-service/ directory with app/, Dockerfile, pyproject.toml. Use Poetry. Async endpoints. CORS for .NET API calls.

title: PDF text extraction with PyMuPDF
objective: Add PDF upload to FastAPI service. Extract text with PyMuPDF, chain with LLM for structured parsing.

criteria.text: PyMuPDF extracts text from all pages
Extracted text sent to LLM for parsing

notes: Day 4 of learning schedule. Test with real Indonesian bank statement PDFs.

title: End-to-end: .NET → Python → LLM pipeline
objective: Connect .NET API to Python AI service. Upload PDF via .NET, forward to Python for AI parsing, return structured JSON.

criteria.text: .NET endpoint accepts PDF and forwards to Python
Python processes and returns structured JSON
Docker Compose updated with Python service

notes: Flow: Browser → .NET API (7208) → Python AI (8000) → Anthropic API → back. Use IHttpClientFactory.

title: Persist AI-parsed transactions to DB
objective: Save AI-parsed transactions to PostgreSQL. Close the full loop: upload → AI parse → save → query.

criteria.text: AI-parsed transactions saved via EF Core
Source tracking (which upload generated which transactions)

notes: Day 6 of learning schedule. Closes the ramp-up phase.

title: LLM provider abstraction layer
objective: Create provider abstraction to switch between Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama without code changes.
notes: Configuration-driven LLM selection. Token usage logged per request.

title: AI-powered auto-categorization
objective: Use LLM to categorize transactions that don't match existing keyword rules. AI fallback for rule-based system.

criteria.text: Confidence score returned with each suggestion
Accepted suggestions create new category rules

title: Natural language transaction query
objective: Query transactions using natural language. LLM translates to DB query, executes, returns human-readable answer.

criteria.text: Returns both answer and underlying data

notes: Example: "How much did I spend on food in January?"

title: pgvector setup + embedding generation
objective: Enable pgvector on PostgreSQL and build embedding pipeline for semantic search and RAG.

criteria.text: EF Core migration adds vector column

notes: Foundation for Sprint 3 RAG pipeline. Vector dimension configurable (1536 OpenAI, 768 local).

title: RAG pipeline for transaction queries
objective: Retrieval-Augmented Generation: embed question, vector search, inject context, LLM generates answer.

title: Semantic search API endpoint
objective: Expose RAG pipeline as user-facing API. Frontend query bar uses this for natural language queries.

title: Function calling — API endpoints as LLM tools
objective: Define .NET API endpoints as tools the LLM can call based on user intent.

criteria.text: Tool definitions for list, filter, aggregate endpoints
Tool execution: LLM output → API call → result

title: Agent loop with Semantic Kernel
objective: Autonomous agent loop: receive goal, plan steps, execute tools, synthesize response.

criteria.text: Agent plugins registered per API capability
Agent loop: goal → plan → execute → observe → answer
Safety: max iterations, cost budget per request

notes: Example: "Categorize all uncategorized transactions from December"

title: Multi-turn agent conversation
objective: Multi-turn conversations with context across messages. Agent maintains conversation state.
notes: Example flow: "Show December expenses" → "Break down by category" → "Which increased vs November?"

title: AI observability + cost tracking
objective: Instrument all AI calls: token usage, latency, cost per query, error rates. Monitoring dashboard.

criteria.text: Every LLM call logs: model, tokens, latency, cost

title: Semantic caching layer
objective: Cache LLM responses for semantically similar queries using embedding similarity.

criteria.text: Query embedding + similarity check before LLM call

notes: "How much on food in Jan?" and "January food spending?" should hit same cache.

title: Auth0 integration + security hardening
objective: Add authentication via Auth0. Secure all endpoints. Rate limit AI endpoints.

title: Backend test suite — Command handlers & validators
objective: Write unit tests for all MediatR command handlers and FluentValidation validators. Currently only CategoryRuleService has tests.

criteria.text: CreateCategoryRuleCommandHandlerTests — happy path, validation failure, DB persist
UpdateCategoryRuleCommandHandlerTests — existing updated, non-existent returns null
CreateTransactionCommandHandlerTests — happy path, validation failure, event published
CreateCategoryRuleCommandValidatorTests — missing fields produce correct errors
CreateTransactionCommandValidatorTests — missing fields produce correct errors
All tests use InMemoryDatabase + IDisposable pattern

notes: Addresses TEST-01 from governance rules. Handlers currently have 0% coverage.

title: Backend test suite — Bank statement parsers
objective: Write unit tests for BcaCsvParser, DefaultCsvParser, NeoBankPdfParser, and BankIdentifier. Parsers currently have zero test coverage.

criteria.text: BcaCsvParserTests — happy path, CR→Income/DB→Expense, stops at Saldo Awal
DefaultCsvParserTests — happy path, malformed rows skipped
BankIdentifierTests — BCA/NeoBank identified, unknown returns null
ICategoryRuleService mocked in all parser tests

notes: Parsers are critical path — a silent parse bug causes incorrect financial data.

title: Backend test suite — TransactionService
objective: Write unit tests for TransactionService covering persistence, duplicate detection, balance calculation, and lookup.

criteria.text: AddTransactionsAsync — valid DTOs persisted and returned
GetTransactionsWithBalanceAsync — CR adds, DB subtracts from running balance
GetTransactionsWithBalanceAsync — wallet filter returns only matching
GetTransactionByIdAsync — existing returns DTO, non-existing returns null

notes: FilterOutDuplicatesAsync composite key hash must be tested to prevent regression.

title: Backend integration tests — Controllers (WebApplicationFactory)
objective: Write integration tests for TransactionsController and CategoryRulesController using WebApplicationFactory with in-memory DB.

criteria.text: CategoryRules CRUD endpoints return correct status codes

notes: Requires Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing NuGet. Program.cs needs public partial class Program {}.

title: Frontend test setup — Vitest + React Testing Library
objective: Set up Vitest + React Testing Library and write initial tests for API clients and key components. Zero frontend tests currently exist.

criteria.text: transactionsApi.test.ts — fetch called with correct URL
categoryRulesApi.test.ts — fetch called with correct URL
Upload component test — empty submit shows error

notes: Frontend has had zero tests since project start. Start minimal — get infrastructure working first.

title: Bug — N+1 in SubmitTransactions: GetAllAsync() called per transaction
objective: Fix GetAllAsync() called inside foreach in TransactionsController.SubmitTransactions — one DB query per submitted transaction.

criteria.text: GetAllAsync() called once before the loop
In-loop check uses pre-fetched in-memory list
Behavior unchanged: new categories still create rules

notes: TransactionsController.cs line 114. Submitting 100 transactions = 100 SELECT * FROM category_rules. Distinct from PF-029.

title: E2E functional test infrastructure — Playwright
objective: Set up Playwright as the E2E testing framework covering the core upload → preview → submit → dashboard user journey.

criteria.text: playwright.config.ts with baseURL, webServer, Chromium project
npm run e2e and npm run e2e:ui scripts added
Test: health check endpoint returns Healthy (API fixture)
Test: dashboard loads with no console errors
Test: upload BCA CSV fixture → preview rows appear
Test: submit flow → transactions appear on dashboard
Test: category rules CRUD via UI
fixtures/ directory with sample BCA CSV

notes: Playwright chosen over Cypress: better TypeScript support, auto-wait, multi-browser, can test API layer via request fixture. Complements unit tests (PF-034–PF-038) — covers the full stack integration path.

title: Bug — Dashboard cash flow ignores year/month query params
objective: Fix GET /api/transactions/aggregated: CashFlow section always uses DateTime.Now as anchor, ignoring the year/month query params.

criteria.text: Cash flow window anchored to requested year/month
No params still returns last 6 months from today
CurrentMonth.Month field uses requested year/month not DateTime.Now

notes: TransactionsController.cs line 235. DateTime.Now.AddMonths(-i) should be anchored to new DateTime(currentYear, currentMonth, 1).AddMonths(-i).

title: Explore MCP servers for developer workflow leverage
objective: Survey the MCP server ecosystem, document already-connected servers (Gmail, Google Calendar), research high-value candidates (GitHub, PostgreSQL, Brave Search), and produce a prioritized shortlist with integration rationale.

criteria.text: Inventory of MCP servers currently connected to this Claude Code instance
For each connected server: document tools exposed and a concrete use case for this project
Research notable community/official MCP servers not yet connected (GitHub, PostgreSQL, Slack, Linear, Brave Search)
Prioritized shortlist (top 3–5) of servers worth adding, with rationale
Update CLAUDE.md or memory files if any server changes day-to-day workflow

notes: Gmail and Google Calendar MCP already connected. Run `claude mcp list` to confirm full server list.
